behaviors.description: The content passed to the summary-generation step includes data retrieved from all three sources.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff: three collectors -> aggregation payload -> summary step. No real OS/network/subprocess is required to prove this behavior; controlled fakes for the three source clients are sufficient. Rejected Unit because behavior explicitly requires cross-module wiring ('retrieved from all three sources' and 'passed to summary-generation step'). Rejected System because behavior text does not require real endpoint/network behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Wire real aggregation/report modules with stubbed source adapters returning distinct sentinel values for metrics, issue tracker, and deployment log. Execute one report build and assert the summary-generation input payload contains all three source sections with correct mapped fields.

behaviors.description: When one data source is unavailable, the report is produced with a `data unavailable` note for that section rather than aborting.
behaviors.justification: This is resilience logic across modules (fetch error handling + report assembly). A stub source that raises timeout/unavailable is enough to reproduce the failure mode and validate degradation behavior. Rejected System because behavior says only 'one data source is unavailable' and does not require real network/OS semantics to trigger that branch. Rejected Agentic because correctness does not depend on model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Run report generation with two source adapters returning normal data and one adapter raising an unavailable error. Assert process completes, output report includes a `data unavailable` marker only for the failing section, and no global abort/exception escapes.

behaviors.description: The narrative summary accurately represents the key values present in the input data.
behaviors.justification: Behavior is about summary content quality ('accurately represents key values'), which depends on what the summarizer actually produces, not just plumbing. A deterministic mock would hide real misrepresentation/hallucination failures. Rejected Integration because it can only verify routing/formatting with fixed outputs, not actual generation correctness. Rejected Workflow because this behavior targets a single summary-generation decision, not multiple agentic decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Use representative real weekly datasets with known key facts, run the real summary-generation model/prompt, and score outputs against factual checks (presence/correctness of key metrics, issue counts, deployment status). Run multiple trials with acceptance thresholds to account for output variance.

behaviors.description: A complete report — from data collection through email delivery — reaches the configured recipient's inbox correctly.
behaviors.justification: This explicitly spans end-to-end external boundaries, especially real email delivery to an inbox. Mocking SMTP/email API can pass while real auth, TLS, provider acceptance, or routing fails. Rejected Integration due behavior text requiring delivery to a real inbox ('reaches the configured recipient's inbox correctly'). Rejected Agentic because asserted outcome is delivery correctness, not model-quality judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the scheduled report job in an environment with real/staging source endpoints and real email delivery path to a test mailbox. Assert one email arrives at configured recipient with expected subject/body sections and correct recipient addressing.

behaviors.description: When the email delivery service is unreachable, the generated report is saved to a local file and delivery is retried on the next scheduled run.
behaviors.justification: Core failure is cross-module fallback/persistence/retry logic: delivery failure -> local file save -> next run reload/retry. This can be caught with real local filesystem plus a failing email adapter in-process. Rejected System because behavior does not require validating real scheduler/real network semantics; 'next scheduled run' can be represented by a second invocation with persisted state. Rejected Agentic because no model-output quality dependency is stated.
behaviors.test_description: Use real report generation and persistence modules with temp filesystem. First invocation: email adapter returns unreachable error; assert report is written to fallback file. Second invocation: email adapter succeeds; assert stored report is retried and file/state is cleared or marked sent.
